title: Zephyr Warhammer
description: A 3D model for the new mace weapon to make it more worthy of its 2% drop.
body: # New look for a new weapon. The Zephyr Warhammer is a 3D model for the new mace weapon introduced in 24w11a snapshot. The vanilla 2D textue takes away from its true weight, and so I designed a model with a personal twist. It's no longer called "Mace," and I dubbed it Zephyr Warhammer (US/GB english only). As the name suggests, it's now a warhammer with a subtle wind motif, following the colour palette of the breeze and the breeze rod. OptiFine not required. The model and texturing was made by me (jonnyloaf) using the Blockbench program. This piece is under the CC-BY-SA 4.0 license. ![Resourcepack description + lore.](https://i.imgur.com/90vhUtQ.png)
